Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

summary:

On macOS, unattended destruction of the final sandbox now tears down the shared NemoClaw gateway so the host listener on port 8080 is released. Linux keeps the existing gateway-preservation default for fast reuse, and explicit CLI or environment overrides still take precedence.

title: [PR] feat(time): timezone-locked clock + canonical timestamp + user-editable quiet schedule
summary:
## Summary

Three coordinated additions giving the bot explicit time-of-day awareness end to end.

### Install-time setup
``setup.sh``'s new ``configure_time`` helper sets the system timezone (defaults to ``Europe/Berlin``, override with ``OCG_TIMEZONE=…``) and enables ``timedatectl set-ntp true``.

title: [PR] fix: fall back to global disabledMcpServers when project has none configured
summary:
## Problem

When a project directory has no `disabledMcpServers` entry in its per-project config inside `.openclaude.json`, `isMcpServerDisabled()` returns `false` for every server. This causes **all configured MCP servers to be enabled** in that project — including servers the user explicitly disab
